description:
## Question

What acceptance evidence and test layers make the workspace-management specification safe to implement? Resolve unit, integration, and real desktop WebDriver coverage; define how existing launch-directory and `--workspace` test setup migrates; and identify any documentation or ADR updates required by the final decisions.

comments.text: HITL decision: require real desktop WebDriver coverage for switching between two disposable Beadwork repositories and for an invalid-directory failure that preserves the prior workspace. Unit and integration coverage remains required for the state machine and explicit cwd threading.

## Resolution

The detailed verification and migration plan is in [workspace-management-verification-and-migration.md](docs/research/workspace-management-verification-and-migration.md).

Acceptance requires Rust unit coverage for explicit cwd/state transitions/generations; RPC/frontend integration coverage for snapshot preservation and error states; and real desktop WebDriver coverage for A to B switching plus invalid-target preservation. The existing launch cwd and --workspace suite migrates to an empty launch seeded only through the normal typed workspace-switch transport.

title: Specify workspace-management verification and migration
